reasoning: Clue 2 states 'Bashkia e qytetit është ndërmjet kishës dhe xhamisë' (The City Hall is between the church and the mosque). The map shows the City Hall icon (G) between the Church icon (F) and Mosque icon (L) on Rruga Fortuzi.

Clue 3 states 'Dhëmbëtari është majtas nga floktorit dhe para xhamisë' (The Dentist is left of the barbershop and in front of the mosque). The Dentist icon (H) on Rruga Vorpsi is to the left of the Barbershop icon (B) and in front of (below) the Mosque icon (L).

Clue 7 states 'Sheshi lojërash është djathtas nga ëmbëlsira' (The playground is to the right of the confectionery). On Rruga Kaçaniku, the Playground icon (N) is to the right of the Confectionery icon (J, cupcake).

Clue 1 states 'Kafeneja është ndërmjet kishës dhe furrës' (The cafe is between the church and the bakery). Interpreting 'ndërmjet' as 'on a street between the streets of', Rruga Vorpsi (with the Cafe) is between Rruga Fortuzi (Church) and Rruga Kaçaniku (Bakery). The Bakery icon is bread (A).
Clue 1 states 'Kafeneja... majtas nga dhëmbëtarit' (The cafe... left of the dentist). On Rruga Vorpsi, the Cafe icon (D, cup) is to the left of the Dentist icon (H).
Clue 4 states 'Dyqani është... majtas nga mishtorja' (The market is... left of the butcher). On Rruga Kaçaniku, the Market icon (K) is to the left of the Butcher icon (C, cleaver).
Clue 2 confirms that the building with the cross icon (F) is the 'Kishë' (Church), as it is next to the City Hall (G) and Mosque (L) as described.

Clue 6 states 'Kopsht është djathtas nga xhamia dhe para maleve' (The garden is to the right of the mosque and in front of the mountains). The empty plot to the right of the Mosque (L) and in front of the Mountains (M) must be the Garden (I).
Clue 6 uses 'maleve' (mountains) to locate the garden. The mountain icon (M) is shown on Rruga e Durrësit, behind the location of the garden.
Clue 3 uses 'floktorit' (barbershop) in relation to the dentist. The scissors icon (B) is to the right of the Dentist (H), confirming this match.
Clue 7 says the playground ('Sheshi lojërash') is to the right of the confectionery. The slide icon (N) is to the right of the cupcake icon (J) on Rruga Kaçaniku.
Clue 4 says the market ('Dyqani') is in front of the dentist. The BIO sign icon (K) is on Rruga Kaçaniku, directly in front of the Dentist (H) on Rruga Vorpsi.
By elimination, and supported by the RIP icon, 'Varrezë' corresponds to the Cemetery (E).
Clue 2 uses 'xhamisë' (mosque) to locate the City Hall. The dome icon (L) is on Rruga Fortuzi as described, confirming 'Xhami' is the Mosque.

The tour ends with the person at the corner of Rruga Vorpsi and Rruga I. Kadare, having just turned to face south. As they continue walking south along Rruga I. Kadare, the first building they would approach on their right is the Playground, located at the next corner (Rruga Kaçaniku).

The perspective is looking east along Rruga Butrinti. The houses on the left are 112, 114, 116, 118, 120. Drita lives in the 'second house on the left' ('shtëpinë e dytë në të majtë'), which is house number 114.
From the same perspective, Kustrim lives in the 'fifth house on the left' ('shtëpinë e pestë në të majtë'). Counting along the left side (112, 114, 116, 118, 120), the fifth house is number 120.
The houses on the right are 111, 113, 115, 117, 119. Lindita lives in the 'fourth house on the right' ('shtëpinë e katërt në të djathtë'). The fourth house on this side is number 117.
From the same perspective, Sokol lives in the 'first house on the right' ('shtëpinë e parë në të djathtë'). The first house on the right side of the street is number 111.
The houses on the left are 112, 114, 116, 118, 120. Valon lives in the 'third house on the left' ('shtëpinë e tretë në të majtë'). The third house on the left side is number 116.
